variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 127 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SA1F40A
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 127 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SA1F40A. Easy to install and replace, the FS 127 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
